modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to set up online payment for application fees and deposits

full_description_text:  
I am looking to have deposits and application fees set up for online payment. Specifically, I need to increase the deposit for the Physician Assistants Program on the Deposits website. Additionally, I would like to know what options are available for collecting fees for external courses or conferences.
